revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:あばれ祭, en:Abare Festival); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-25) == == 改名提案 == 現在の記事名「あばれ祭り」から「あばれ祭」への改名を提案します。[https://abarematsuri.jp/ 当該祭りの公式ウェブサイト]、地元である[https://www.town.noto.lg.jp/kakuka/1009/gyomu/20/1/1258.html 能登町の公式サイト]、[https://www.hot-ishikawa.jp/event/detail_12007.html 石川県観光公式サイト]のいずれもが「あばれ祭」と記載しており、また[https://www3.nhk.or.jp/news/html/20240705/k10014502871000.html NHK]・[https://www.asahi.com/articles/ASS770FR5S77PJLB00LM.html 朝日新聞]・[https://www.yomiuri.co.jp/stream/3/04567/717/ 読売新聞]・[https://www.jiji.com/jc/article?k=2024070500946&g=soc 時事通信]や[https://www.chunichi.co.jp/article/1067084 中日新聞]など複数の信頼できる情報源もこの表記を使用していることから、こちらの表記のほうがより一般的に使われているものと判断できます。--[[利用者:Yasu|Yasu]]（[[利用者‐会話:Yasu|会話]]） 2025年5月31日 (土) 14:58 (UTC) :{{対処}} 反対意見がないため、提案通り改名しました。--[[利用者:Yasu|Yasu]]（[[利用者‐会話:Yasu|会話]]） 2025年6月8日 (日) 15:05 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-25) == {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start|1= {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid|culture=y}} {{WikiProject Holidays|importance=low}} {{WikiProject Festivals|importance=mid}} }} {{Image requested|in=Ishikawa Prefecture}} == Lede rewrite == The lede explains nothing to the average reader about this festival. What is celebrated, and why?--[[User:Dthomsen8|DThomsen8]] ([[User talk:Dthomsen8|talk]]) 01:24, 14 June 2012 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just added archive links to {{plural:2|one external link|2 external links}} on [[Abare Festival]]. Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=706978939 my edit]. If necessary, add {{tlx|cbignore}} after the link to keep me from modifying it. Alternatively, you can add {{tlx|nobots|deny{{=}}InternetArchiveBot}} to keep me off the page altogether. I made the following changes: *Added archive http://web.archive.org/web/20120510235827/http://www.infomapjapan.com/event.phtml?pid=200706 to http://www.infomapjapan.com/event.phtml?pid=200706 *Added archive http://web.archive.org/web/20120521032407/http://hot-ishikawa.jp/f-lang/english/noto-area/event-detail.html to http://hot-ishikawa.jp/f-lang/english/noto-area/event-detail.html When you have finished reviewing my changes, please set the ''checked'' parameter below to '''true''' to let others know. {{sourcecheck|checked=true}} Cheers.—[[User:Cyberbot II|cyberbot II]][[User talk:Cyberbot II|Talk to my owner]]:Online 09:57, 26 February 2016 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified {{plural:1|one external link|1 external links}} on [[Abare Festival]]. Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=742195443 my edit]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20120521032407/http://hot-ishikawa.jp/f-lang/english/noto-area/event-detail.html to http://hot-ishikawa.jp/f-lang/english/noto-area/event-detail.html When you have finished reviewing my changes, please set the ''checked'' parameter below to '''true''' or '''failed''' to let others know (documentation at {{tlx|Sourcecheck}}). {{sourcecheck|checked=false}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 07:08, 2 October 2016 (UTC)

revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:あばれ祭, en:Abare Festival); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 18:41, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-25) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 18:41, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == 改名提案 == 現在の記事名「あばれ祭り」から「あばれ祭」への改名を提案します。[https://abarematsuri.jp/ 当該祭りの公式ウェブサイト]、地元である[https://www.town.noto.lg.jp/kakuka/1009/gyomu/20/1/1258.html 能登町の公式サイト]、[https://www.hot-ishikawa.jp/event/detail_12007.html 石川県観光公式サイト]のいずれもが「あばれ祭」と記載しており、また[https://www3.nhk.or.jp/news/html/20240705/k10014502871000.html NHK]・[https://www.asahi.com/articles/ASS770FR5S77PJLB00LM.html 朝日新聞]・[https://www.yomiuri.co.jp/stream/3/04567/717/ 読売新聞]・[https://www.jiji.com/jc/article?k=2024070500946&g=soc 時事通信]や[https://www.chunichi.co.jp/article/1067084 中日新聞]など複数の信頼できる情報源もこの表記を使用していることから、こちらの表記のほうがより一般的に使われているものと判断できます。--[[利用者:Yasu|Yasu]]（[[利用者‐会話:Yasu|会話]]） 2025年5月31日 (土) 14:58 (UTC) :{{対処}} 反対意見がないため、提案通り改名しました。--[[利用者:Yasu|Yasu]]（[[利用者‐会話:Yasu|会話]]） 2025年6月8日 (日) 15:05 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-25) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 18:41, 25 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start|1= {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid|culture=y}} {{WikiProject Holidays|importance=low}} {{WikiProject Festivals|importance=mid}} }} {{Image requested|in=Ishikawa Prefecture}} == Lede rewrite == The lede explains nothing to the average reader about this festival. What is celebrated, and why?--[[User:Dthomsen8|DThomsen8]] ([[User talk:Dthomsen8|talk]]) 01:24, 14 June 2012 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just added archive links to {{plural:2|one external link|2 external links}} on [[Abare Festival]]. Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=706978939 my edit]. If necessary, add {{tlx|cbignore}} after the link to keep me from modifying it. Alternatively, you can add {{tlx|nobots|deny{{=}}InternetArchiveBot}} to keep me off the page altogether. I made the following changes: *Added archive http://web.archive.org/web/20120510235827/http://www.infomapjapan.com/event.phtml?pid=200706 to http://www.infomapjapan.com/event.phtml?pid=200706 *Added archive http://web.archive.org/web/20120521032407/http://hot-ishikawa.jp/f-lang/english/noto-area/event-detail.html to http://hot-ishikawa.jp/f-lang/english/noto-area/event-detail.html When you have finished reviewing my changes, please set the ''checked'' parameter below to '''true''' to let others know. {{sourcecheck|checked=true}} Cheers.—[[User:Cyberbot II|cyberbot II]][[User talk:Cyberbot II|Talk to my owner]]:Online 09:57, 26 February 2016 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified {{plural:1|one external link|1 external links}} on [[Abare Festival]]. Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=742195443 my edit]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20120521032407/http://hot-ishikawa.jp/f-lang/english/noto-area/event-detail.html to http://hot-ishikawa.jp/f-lang/english/noto-area/event-detail.html When you have finished reviewing my changes, please set the ''checked'' parameter below to '''true''' or '''failed''' to let others know (documentation at {{tlx|Sourcecheck}}). {{sourcecheck|checked=false}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 07:08, 2 October 2016 (UTC)

revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:あばれ祭, en:Abare Festival); add local discussion section + dated import note

20:03, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 18:41, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/105159289 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:03, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == 改名提案 == 現在の記事名「あばれ祭り」から「あばれ祭」への改名を提案します。[https://abarematsuri.jp/ 当該祭りの公式ウェブサイト]、地元である[https://www.town.noto.lg.jp/kakuka/1009/gyomu/20/1/1258.html 能登町の公式サイト]、[https://www.hot-ishikawa.jp/event/detail_12007.html 石川県観光公式サイト]のいずれもが「あばれ祭」と記載しており、また[https://www3.nhk.or.jp/news/html/20240705/k10014502871000.html NHK]・[https://www.asahi.com/articles/ASS770FR5S77PJLB00LM.html 朝日新聞]・[https://www.yomiuri.co.jp/stream/3/04567/717/ 読売新聞]・[https://www.jiji.com/jc/article?k=2024070500946&g=soc 時事通信]や[https://www.chunichi.co.jp/article/1067084 中日新聞]など複数の信頼できる情報源もこの表記を使用していることから、こちらの表記のほうがより一般的に使われているものと判断できます。--[[利用者:Yasu|Yasu]]（[[利用者‐会話:Yasu|会話]]） 2025年5月31日 (土) 14:58 (UTC) :{{対処}} 反対意見がないため、提案通り改名しました。--[[利用者:Yasu|Yasu]]（[[利用者‐会話:Yasu|会話]]） 2025年6月8日 (日) 15:05 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:03, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1204414509 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:03, 25 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start|1= {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid|culture=y}} {{WikiProject Holidays|importance=low}} {{WikiProject Festivals|importance=mid}} }} {{Image requested|in=Ishikawa Prefecture}} == Lede rewrite == The lede explains nothing to the average reader about this festival. What is celebrated, and why?--[[User:Dthomsen8|DThomsen8]] ([[User talk:Dthomsen8|talk]]) 01:24, 14 June 2012 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:03, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just added archive links to {{plural:2|one external link|2 external links}} on [[Abare Festival]]. Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=706978939 my edit]. If necessary, add {{tlx|cbignore}} after the link to keep me from modifying it. Alternatively, you can add {{tlx|nobots|deny{{=}}InternetArchiveBot}} to keep me off the page altogether. I made the following changes: *Added archive http://web.archive.org/web/20120510235827/http://www.infomapjapan.com/event.phtml?pid=200706 to http://www.infomapjapan.com/event.phtml?pid=200706 *Added archive http://web.archive.org/web/20120521032407/http://hot-ishikawa.jp/f-lang/english/noto-area/event-detail.html to http://hot-ishikawa.jp/f-lang/english/noto-area/event-detail.html When you have finished reviewing my changes, please set the ''checked'' parameter below to '''true''' to let others know. {{sourcecheck|checked=true}} Cheers.—[[User:Cyberbot II|cyberbot II]][[User talk:Cyberbot II|Talk to my owner]]:Online 09:57, 26 February 2016 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:03, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified {{plural:1|one external link|1 external links}} on [[Abare Festival]]. Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=742195443 my edit]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20120521032407/http://hot-ishikawa.jp/f-lang/english/noto-area/event-detail.html to http://hot-ishikawa.jp/f-lang/english/noto-area/event-detail.html When you have finished reviewing my changes, please set the ''checked'' parameter below to '''true''' or '''failed''' to let others know (documentation at {{tlx|Sourcecheck}}). {{sourcecheck|checked=false}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 07:08, 2 October 2016 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:03, 25 February 2026 (UTC)

Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/105159289 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:38, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == 改名提案 == 現在の記事名「あばれ祭り」から「あばれ祭」への改名を提案します。[https://abarematsuri.jp/ 当該祭りの公式ウェブサイト]、地元である[https://www.town.noto.lg.jp/kakuka/1009/gyomu/20/1/1258.html 能登町の公式サイト]、[https://www.hot-ishikawa.jp/event/detail_12007.html 石川県観光公式サイト]のいずれもが「あばれ祭」と記載しており、また[https://www3.nhk.or.jp/news/html/20240705/k10014502871000.html NHK]・[https://www.asahi.com/articles/ASS770FR5S77PJLB00LM.html 朝日新聞]・[https://www.yomiuri.co.jp/stream/3/04567/717/ 読売新聞]・[https://www.jiji.com/jc/article?k=2024070500946&g=soc 時事通信]や[https://www.chunichi.co.jp/article/1067084 中日新聞]など複数の信頼できる情報源もこの表記を使用していることから、こちらの表記のほうがより一般的に使われているものと判断できます。--[[利用者:Yasu|Yasu]]（[[利用者‐会話:Yasu|会話]]） 2025年5月31日 (土) 14:58 (UTC) :{{対処}} 反対意見がないため、提案通り改名しました。--[[利用者:Yasu|Yasu]]（[[利用者‐会話:Yasu|会話]]） 2025年6月8日 (日) 15:05 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=706978939 my edit]. If necessary, add {{tlx|cbignore}} after the link to keep me from modifying it. Alternatively, you can add {{tlx|nobots|deny{{=}}InternetArchiveBot}} to keep me off the page altogether. I made the following changes: *Added archive http://web.archive.org/web/20120510235827/http://www.infomapjapan.com/event.phtml?pid=200706 to http://www.infomapjapan.com/event.phtml?pid=200706 *Added archive http://web.archive.org/web/20120521032407/http://hot-ishikawa.jp/f-lang/english/noto-area/event-detail.html to http://hot-ishikawa.jp/f-lang/english/noto-area/event-detail.html When you have finished reviewing my changes, please set the ''checked'' parameter below to '''true''' to let others know. {{sourcecheck|checked=true}} Cheers.—[[User:Cyberbot II|cyberbot II]][[User talk:Cyberbot II|Talk to my owner]]:Online 09:57, 26 February 2016 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:09, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified {{plural:1|one external link|1 external links}} on [[Abare Festival]]. Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=742195443 my edit]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20120521032407/http://hot-ishikawa.jp/f-lang/english/noto-area/event-detail.html to http://hot-ishikawa.jp/f-lang/english/noto-area/event-detail.html When you have finished reviewing my changes, please set the ''checked'' parameter below to '''true''' or '''failed''' to let others know (documentation at {{tlx|Sourcecheck}}). {{sourcecheck|checked=false}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 07:08, 2 October 2016 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:09, 25 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:あばれ祭, en:Abare Festival); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:26, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:09, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:38, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:03, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 18:41, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/105159289 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:26, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == 改名提案 == 現在の記事名「あばれ祭り」から「あばれ祭」への改名を提案します。[https://abarematsuri.jp/ 当該祭りの公式ウェブサイト]、地元である[https://www.town.noto.lg.jp/kakuka/1009/gyomu/20/1/1258.html 能登町の公式サイト]、[https://www.hot-ishikawa.jp/event/detail_12007.html 石川県観光公式サイト]のいずれもが「あばれ祭」と記載しており、また[https://www3.nhk.or.jp/news/html/20240705/k10014502871000.html NHK]・[https://www.asahi.com/articles/ASS770FR5S77PJLB00LM.html 朝日新聞]・[https://www.yomiuri.co.jp/stream/3/04567/717/ 読売新聞]・[https://www.jiji.com/jc/article?k=2024070500946&g=soc 時事通信]や[https://www.chunichi.co.jp/article/1067084 中日新聞]など複数の信頼できる情報源もこの表記を使用していることから、こちらの表記のほうがより一般的に使われているものと判断できます。--[[利用者:Yasu|Yasu]]（[[利用者‐会話:Yasu|会話]]） 2025年5月31日 (土) 14:58 (UTC) :{{対処}} 反対意見がないため、提案通り改名しました。--[[利用者:Yasu|Yasu]]（[[利用者‐会話:Yasu|会話]]） 2025年6月8日 (日) 15:05 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:26, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1204414509 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:26, 25 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start|1= {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid|culture=y}} {{WikiProject Holidays|importance=low}} {{WikiProject Festivals|importance=mid}} }} {{Image requested|in=Ishikawa Prefecture}} == Lede rewrite == The lede explains nothing to the average reader about this festival. What is celebrated, and why?--[[User:Dthomsen8|DThomsen8]] ([[User talk:Dthomsen8|talk]]) 01:24, 14 June 2012 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:26, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just added archive links to {{plural:2|one external link|2 external links}} on [[Abare Festival]]. Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=706978939 my edit]. If necessary, add {{tlx|cbignore}} after the link to keep me from modifying it. Alternatively, you can add {{tlx|nobots|deny{{=}}InternetArchiveBot}} to keep me off the page altogether. I made the following changes: *Added archive http://web.archive.org/web/20120510235827/http://www.infomapjapan.com/event.phtml?pid=200706 to http://www.infomapjapan.com/event.phtml?pid=200706 *Added archive http://web.archive.org/web/20120521032407/http://hot-ishikawa.jp/f-lang/english/noto-area/event-detail.html to http://hot-ishikawa.jp/f-lang/english/noto-area/event-detail.html When you have finished reviewing my changes, please set the ''checked'' parameter below to '''true''' to let others know. {{sourcecheck|checked=true}} Cheers.—[[User:Cyberbot II|cyberbot II]][[User talk:Cyberbot II|Talk to my owner]]:Online 09:57, 26 February 2016 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:26, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified {{plural:1|one external link|1 external links}} on [[Abare Festival]]. Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=742195443 my edit]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20120521032407/http://hot-ishikawa.jp/f-lang/english/noto-area/event-detail.html to http://hot-ishikawa.jp/f-lang/english/noto-area/event-detail.html When you have finished reviewing my changes, please set the ''checked'' parameter below to '''true''' or '''failed''' to let others know (documentation at {{tlx|Sourcecheck}}). {{sourcecheck|checked=false}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 07:08, 2 October 2016 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:26, 25 February 2026 (UTC)

talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 23:26, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == 改名提案 == 現在の記事名「あばれ祭り」から「あばれ祭」への改名を提案します。[https://abarematsuri.jp/ 当該祭りの公式ウェブサイト]、地元である[https://www.town.noto.lg.jp/kakuka/1009/gyomu/20/1/1258.html 能登町の公式サイト]、[https://www.hot-ishikawa.jp/event/detail_12007.html 石川県観光公式サイト]のいずれもが「あばれ祭」と記載しており、また[https://www3.nhk.or.jp/news/html/20240705/k10014502871000.html NHK]・[https://www.asahi.com/articles/ASS770FR5S77PJLB00LM.html 朝日新聞]・[https://www.yomiuri.co.jp/stream/3/04567/717/ 読売新聞]・[https://www.jiji.com/jc/article?k=2024070500946&g=soc 時事通信]や[https://www.chunichi.co.jp/article/1067084 中日新聞]など複数の信頼できる情報源もこの表記を使用していることから、こちらの表記のほうがより一般的に使われているものと判断できます。--[[利用者:Yasu|Yasu]]（[[利用者‐会話:Yasu|会話]]） 2025年5月31日 (土) 14:58 (UTC) :{{対処}} revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Abare_Festival here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]

shell|class=Start|1= {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid|culture=y}} {{WikiProject Holidays|importance=low}} {{WikiProject Festivals|importance=mid}} }} {{Image requested|in=Ishikawa Prefecture}} == Lede rewrite == The lede explains nothing to the average reader about this festival. What is celebrated, and why?--[[User:Dthomsen8|DThomsen8]] ([[User talk:Dthomsen8|talk]]) 01:24, 14 June 2012 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 23:26, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just added archive links to {{plural:2|one external link|2 external links}} on [[Abare Festival]]. Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=706978939 my edit]. If necessary, add {{tlx|cbignore}} after the link to keep me from modifying it. Alternatively, you can add {{tlx|nobots|deny{{=}}InternetArchiveBot}} to keep me off the page altogether. I made the following changes: *Added archive http://web.archive.org/web/20120510235827/http://www.infomapjapan.com/event.phtml?pid=200706 to http://www.infomapjapan.com/event.phtml?pid=200706 *Added archive http://web.archive.org/web/20120521032407/http://hot-ishikawa.jp/f-lang/english/noto-area/event-detail.html to http://hot-ishikawa.jp/f-lang/english/noto-area/event-detail.html When you have finished reviewing my changes, please set the ''checked'' parameter below to '''true''' to let others know. {{sourcecheck|checked=true}} Cheers.—[[User:Cyberbot II|cyberbot II]][[User talk:Cyberbot II|Talk to my owner]]:Online 09:57, 26 February 2016 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 23:26, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified {{plural:1|one external link|1 external links}} on [[Abare Festival]]. Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=742195443 my edit]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20120521032407/http://hot-ishikawa.jp/f-lang/english/noto-area/event-detail.html to http://hot-ishikawa.jp/f-lang/english/noto-area/event-detail.html When you have finished reviewing my changes, please set the ''checked'' parameter below to '''true''' or '''failed''' to let others know (documentation at {{tlx|Sourcecheck}}). {{sourcecheck|checked=false}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 07:08, 2 October 2016 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 23:26, 25 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Abare_Festival here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 23:26, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:26, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:09, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:38, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:03, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 18:41, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/105159289 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 23:26, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == 改名提案 == 現在の記事名「あばれ祭り」から「あばれ祭」への改名を提案します。[https://abarematsuri.jp/ 当該祭りの公式ウェブサイト]、地元である[https://www.town.noto.lg.jp/kakuka/1009/gyomu/20/1/1258.html 能登町の公式サイト]、[https://www.hot-ishikawa.jp/event/detail_12007.html 石川県観光公式サイト]のいずれもが「あばれ祭」と記載しており、また[https://www3.nhk.or.jp/news/html/20240705/k10014502871000.html NHK]・[https://www.asahi.com/articles/ASS770FR5S77PJLB00LM.html 朝日新聞]・[https://www.yomiuri.co.jp/stream/3/04567/717/ 読売新聞]・[https://www.jiji.com/jc/article?k=2024070500946&g=soc 時事通信]や[https://www.chunichi.co.jp/article/1067084 中日新聞]など複数の信頼できる情報源もこの表記を使用していることから、こちらの表記のほうがより一般的に使われているものと判断できます。--[[User:Yasu|Yasu]]（[[利用者‐会話:Yasu|会話]]） 2025年5月31日 (土) 14:58 (UTC) :{{対処}} 反対意見がないため、提案通り改名しました。--[[User:Yasu|Yasu]]（[[利用者‐会話:Yasu|会話]]） 2025年6月8日 (日) 15:05 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 23:26, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1204414509 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 23:26, 25 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start|1= {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid|culture=y}} {{WikiProject Holidays|importance=low}} {{WikiProject Festivals|importance=mid}} }} {{Image requested|in=Ishikawa Prefecture}} == Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=706978939 my edit]. If necessary, add {{tlx|cbignore}} after the link to keep me from modifying it. Alternatively, you can add {{tlx|nobots|deny{{=}}InternetArchiveBot}} to keep me off the page altogether.
